description:
Advanced Cloud Phone System

Voxbi is an advanced cloud phone system that levels up your business communications. It is a feature-rich VoIP phone solution that allows you to optimize and manage all your communications from a single hub.
New Features
- Updated keyboard shortcuts
- Added theme support - Light, Dark and System default
- Theme choice is saved in application settings
- Themes can be changed in real time dynamically
- Some of the windows have been changed to dialogs

Enhancements
- Updated digital signature
- Menu items are with bigger icons
- Updated UI for keyboard shortcuts
- Security software should not complain about keyboard shortcuts anymore
- Updated packages
